title: Paediatric Speech Therapist
description:
We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Speech Therapist to join our dynamics team in delivering outstanding results for our clients and their families, using the latest research and innovative tools to create customised therapy plans and help us to redefine the future of healthcare.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Conduct assessments to identify speech, language, communication, and feeding challenges in children, including those with developmental delays, autism spectrum disorders, sensory-based feeding issues, and other specific impairments.
  • Develop and deliver individualized treatment plans to address speech, language, and feeding difficulties, focusing on developmental feeding skills and safe swallowing.
  • Provide parent and caregiver training to ensure continuity of feeding strategies at home, addressing mealtime routines and safe feeding practices.
  • Collaborate with parents, teachers, and multidisciplinary teams to support each child’s development and educational goals.
  • Educate families and caregivers on therapy techniques and strategies to support their child’s progress at home.
  • Maintain detailed and accurate patient records and documentation.
  • Participate in ongoing professional development and stay current with advancements in pediatric speech-language therapy.
  • Use our cutting-edge software to manage clients care and deliver on-going therapy.

What we Offer:

  • Full-time / Part-time / Locum options available
  • Above-Market Salary - We believe in recognizing your dedication and expertise. Enjoy a highly competitive salary package that reflects your commitment to changing children’s lives.
  • Innovative Environment - Access cutting-edge tools and technology that enhance therapy outcomes and reduce workload, while allowing you the freedom to use tried-and-true methods you trust.
  • Child-Focused Impact - Work directly with children, helping them develop the crucial communication skills that will shape their futures.
  • Client-Centric Approach -We focus on actual client needs and outcomes, not on maximizing intervention for profit. Your role is to empower each child and family in the most effective, empathetic way possible.

Requirement

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Speech Language Therapy from a recognized accredited institution.
  • Minimum 2 year of hands-on experience in speech therapy, preferably with children. Fresh graduates with hands-on experience in paediatric settings or placements are encouraged to apply, as we value the passion and dedication you bring to the table.
  • Valid AHPC (Allied Health Professions Council) registration or eligibility for registration in Singapore.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong ability to connect with children and their families.
  • Ability to work collaboratively with a multidisciplinary team.
  • Compassionate, patient-centered approach with a commitment to enhancing the quality of life for children.
  • Fluency in English and proficiency in additional languages is a plus.

Interested parties, please send your resume with current & expected salary and availability to agnes_ho@therapy.com.sg.  We regret only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

postedCompany.description: Theratech is a revolutionary therapy-technology company that's dedicated to making therapy accessible and efficient for everyone. Our innovative solution brings together a team of allied health professionals, therapists, developers and designers to create a platform that streamlines the therapy process from start to finish by making it simpler and faster for both clients and providers.
postedCompany.name: THERATECH.AI PTE. LTD.
